name: headache
title: best herbal teas for headache
description: Foeniculum vulgare tea contains bioactive constituents such as estragole, limonene, and anethole, which have analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic properties that help to treat headache ailments. The herbal tea's analgesic and anti-inflammatory properties provide relief from headaches by reducing pain and inflammation in the brain and blood vessels.
